name: git-remote-changes-alert
description: Makes remote Git changes and default branch drift visible in the VS Code status bar.

commands.title: Git Remote Changes Alert: Fetch and Refresh

git-remote-changes-alert.defaultBranch.description: Default branch to compare feature branches against. Leave empty to use the remote HEAD, then origin/main or origin/master. Values like main, origin/main, and refs/heads/main are supported.

git-remote-changes-alert.showWhenUpToDat.description: Show a quiet status bar item even when the current branch has no missing upstream or default branch commits.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
